description_long: This object is a sleek, modern wireless router with a matte black finish and three prominent external antennas extending from the back and sides. The body is rectangular with layered horizontal segments, giving it a robust and high-tech appearance. Subtle gold accents are visible near the antenna bases and on the top surface, where a brand logo and possibly a model number are inscribed. The front face features faintly labeled sections, likely indicating Ethernet and RJ45 ports, though the actual ports are not visible in these views. The device appears compact and sturdy, designed to sit on a flat surface such as a desk or shelf. Its overall design suggests high performance and advanced connectivity, suitable for urban environments requiring strong wireless coverage.
description: A matte black, rectangular wireless router with three external antennas and gold accents, featuring layered segments and subtle branding on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing three antennas, gold accents, and faint port labels on the front edge.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the angled antennas and the layered body structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full spread of the three antennas and gold accent details.
description_view_3: Right-side view with a clear look at the side antenna and the device's stacked design.
